image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Here's what science actually says about vaccine efficacy vs effectiveness.
Context visual: Efficacy measures how well a vaccine works in controlled trials. Effectiveness? That's real-world performance.
Escalation visual: Imagine a vaccine showing 95% efficacy in trials. But what about in everyday life? It may drop due to factors like behav
Evidence visual: Studies show that effectiveness can vary widely. For example, flu vaccines might be only 40% effective in a bad year.
Payoff visual: Understanding this difference helps us make informed choices about vaccinations and public health.
Cta visual: Want to dive deeper into science? Hit that follow button!
